hook: A therapist ran her first session on Faresay this week.
vo: Ran the video call through the platform.
Got paid. Money in two days.
No commission taken. Just standard card processing — which Faresay keeps none of.
cta: That's it. That's the whole pitch.
broll_notes: Screen capture of the Faresay app on a phone: booking confirmation, video session interface, payment received notification. No presenter. Clean and unhurried.
